OmopIndices 0.1.0
  • Reference

Add obesity flag

Source: R/obesity.R
addObesity.Rd

Add obesity flag

Usage

addObesity(
  x,
  indexDate = "cohort_start_date",
  window = c(-Inf, 0),
  conceptSet = NULL,
  bmiThreshold = NULL,
  nameStyle = "obesity",
  name = tableName(x)
)

Arguments

x

A cdm_table object, it mus contain person_id or subject_id as columns.

indexDate

A character string that points to a Date column in the x table.

window

Window to asses bmi in, it must be a vector of two numeric values c(min, max). Window times refer to days since indexDate.

conceptSet

It can either be a , <codelist_with_details> or <concept_set_expression> object. It must contain bmi as concepts. If NULL concepts will be retrieved using the OmopConcepts package.

bmiThreshold

Argument to indicate the thresholds for the obesity using BMI measurements. It can be:

  • A single number, any BMI measurement above the threshold will be consider as an obesity record.

  • A tibble with the columns bmi_threshold, sex, age_min and age_max, to use age and sex specific thresholds.

  • NULL the table OmopIndices::bmiThreshold will be used.

nameStyle

A character string with the name of the new column.

name

A character string with the name of the new table. If NULL a temporary table will be created.

Value

The table x with a new column column indicating if subjects have an obesity record in the window of interest.

Examples

library(OmopIndices)
